name: Apollo_enrichment
description: Enrich a list of leads with Apollo.io People Search. Accepts leads as JSON array, adds decision-maker contacts per company domain, returns enriched leads.

leads.description: Array of lead objects (output from lead_generation skill). Each object should have at minimum a 'company_domain' field.

per_domain.description: Max decision-maker contacts to fetch per company domain (default 5)
